     The Numbers Business Report

Frankenweenie (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,287,788Details
International Box Office $45,863,000
Worldwide Box Office $81,150,788
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $19,987,996
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $7,396,607
Total $27,384,603
Further financial details...

Synopsis

"Frankenweenie" is a heartwarming tale about a boy and his dog. After unexpectedly losing his beloved dog Sparky, young Victor harnesses the power of science to bring his best friend back to life - with just a few minor adjustments. He tries to hide his home-sewn creation, but when Sparky gets out, Victor's fellow students, teachers and the entire town all learn that getting a new "leash on life" can be monstrous.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,412,213 (32.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.09 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$39,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,005 opening theaters/3,005 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $52,995,131

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 5th, 2012 (Wide) by Walt Disney
October 5th, 2012 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: October 4th, 2012 (Wide) (Lebanon)
October 4th, 2012 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
October 5th, 2012 (Wide) (Latvia)
October 11th, 2012 (Wide) (Ecuador)
October 11th, 2012 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: January 8th, 2013 by Buena Vista Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic elements, scary images and action.
(Rating bulletin 2232, 7/18/2012)
Running Time: 87 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Development Hell, Director Remaking Their Own Movie, Prologue, Retro Black and White
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Inspirational Teacher, Inventor, Mad Scientist, Monster, Romance, Vampire, Werewolf
Social setting: Kaiju
Subgenre: Kids Horror
Source:Based on Short Film
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Stop-Motion Animation
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Tim Burton
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

"Frankenweenie" is a heartwarming tale about a boy and his dog. After unexpectedly losing his beloved dog Sparky, young Victor harnesses the power of science to bring his best friend back to life - with just a few minor adjustments. He tries to hide his home-sewn creation, but when Sparky gets out, Victor's fellow students, teachers and the entire town all learn that getting a new "leash on life" can be monstrous.
